creator: fishy@hotbot.com
text:
I'm pleased to announce that I have finished work on a new version of
timed.8 which incorporates both a new layout and numerous
language/spelling/error improvements, including the incorporation of the
-F flag.

The candidate that I submit for inclusion into FreeBSD is located at:
http://u2.netgate.net/~fishy/freebsd/timedcan.8


A diff between the candidate and the reorganized version which I
submitted to gnats earlier is located at:
http://u2.netgate.net/~fishy/freebsd/timediff.8


A diff between the candidate and the original version (which is
currently in FreeBSD) is located at:
http://u2.netgate.net/~fishy/freebsd/timediffo.8


Feedback is always appreciated :).

- Nick Sanders
